test_runs.notes: 1 skipped = tests/test_ipc_integration.py::test_ipc_integration_live — gated on ESR_E2E_RUNTIME=1 env var (intentional, not env-broken).

test_runs.command: cd adapters/cc_mcp && PYTHONPATH=src uv run --with mcp --with anyio --with aiohttp --with websockets --with pytest --with pytest-asyncio pytest tests/ -q
test_runs.description: cc_mcp adapter — NOT registered in py/pyproject.toml tool.uv.sources (only feishu+cc_tmux+handlers are). Runs out-of-tree via pytest-with-deps.
test_runs.notes: ENV-ISSUE-CANDIDATE: cc_mcp is missing from py/pyproject.toml [tool.uv.sources] and [dependency-groups.dev]. Consider adding for uniform test execution.

test_runs.description: Tests for mock_cc, mock_feishu, mock_mcp_ctl, ledger_append, loopguard_* and verify_* utilities. Not in py testpaths.

failures.cause: CODE-BUG: fixture is stale. v0.2-channel widened the loopguard allowlist in scripts/loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py:8 to require BOTH {e2e-feishu-cc.yaml, e2e-esr-channel.yaml}, but the test fixture writes only one file. Not an env issue.

test_runs.notes: Also includes bash test scripts/tests/test_esrd_sh.sh (runs separately, 6/6 pass).

test_runs.description: Bash integration test for scripts/esrd.sh lifecycle (start, status, stop, idempotency).
test_runs.notes: 6/6 PASS: start→pidfile, kill-0, status RUNNING, idempotent start, stop→pidfile gone, status STOPPED.

test_runs.description: All Elixir ExUnit tests (lib/esr core, lib/esr/* subsystems, lib/esr_web channels).

tests: cli:run/<name> instantiates a one-node artifact and returns the handle
cli:stop/<name> deactivates the named topology and returns its stopped peer ids
cli:deadletter/list returns serialised entries after enqueue
unknown cli:* topic returns structured error (reviewer C2)
failures.cause: FLAKY-TIMING: assert_receive default 100ms timeout under parallel max_cases=16. With --max-cases 1 --seed 0, reduces to 2 failures. Running cli_channel_test.exs in isolation passes 19/19. Suggests a test-harness timing bug, not a runtime bug.

test_runs.notes: Elixir 1.19.5 / Erlang OTP 28. Compiled cleanly (1 style warning at lib/esr/topology/instantiator.ex:332 — defp clauses should be grouped).

known_issues.summary: test_exactly_one_allowed_file_passes fixture stale after v0.2-channel widened the loopguard allowlist
known_issues.fix: Update scripts/tests/test_loopguard_scenarios_allowlist.py to write BOTH e2e-feishu-cc.yaml and e2e-esr-channel.yaml in the 'allowed' fixture setup.

known_issues.summary: EsrWeb.CliChannelTest 3-4 tests fail intermittently under parallel execution (max_cases=16 or =1)
known_issues.fix: Increase assert_receive timeout in cli_channel_test.exs, or isolate the tests to async: false, or use ExUnit's describe block with :serial tag.

known_issues.summary: lib/esr/topology/instantiator.ex has two defp issue_init_directive/2 clauses (lines 261, 332) separated by helpers
known_issues.fix: Group the clauses together per Elixir best practice.

known_issues.summary: adapters/cc_mcp is not in py/pyproject.toml's [tool.uv.sources] or [dependency-groups.dev]
known_issues.fix: Add esr-adapter-cc-mcp = { path = '../adapters/cc_mcp', editable = true } and include in dev group. Add ../adapters/cc_mcp/tests to pytest testpaths.
